summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Indian Profiles rebrand. All backend APIs (32/32 tests) and frontend pages passed successfully. Branding is consistent throughout - no 'Jagruthi' or 'BJP' references found. Logo displays correctly, color scheme matches (navy/orange/magenta), and all CRUD operations work with new Supabase database.
passed_tests: Backend: Root API returns 'Indian Profiles API'
Backend: Admin login with admin@indianprofiles.com / Admin@123
Backend: All CRUD operations (States, Districts, Constituencies, Sub-Regions, Leaders, Articles, Grievances, Volunteers, Events)
Backend: Stats endpoint returns correct counts
Backend: Geography tree endpoint works
Backend: Search API (GET /api/search?q=Telangana) returns results
Frontend: Public home page loads with 'Indian Profiles' branding
Frontend: Page title is 'Indian Profiles - Connecting Citizens & Leaders'
Frontend: Logo displays at /logo/indian-profiles-logo.png on all pages
Frontend: Navbar shows 'The Indian Profiles' with orange/magenta colors
Frontend: Admin Login button has orange→magenta gradient
Frontend: Footer shows 'Indian Profiles' and @indianprofiles
Frontend: No 'Jagruthi' or 'BJP' text found anywhere
Frontend: Admin login works and redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows 'The Indian Profiles' logo and 'DASHBOARD' label
Frontend: Active nav items have navy tint with orange left border
Frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with stats cards
Frontend: Geography Manager loads with States tab
Frontend: Profile Manager loads
Frontend: Article Editor loads
Frontend: Social Media Hub loads with 'Indian Profiles @indianprofiles'
Frontend: Grievance Desk loads
Frontend: Volunteers page loads
Frontend: Events page loads
Frontend: User Management page loads
Frontend: Public search functionality works
Frontend: Color scheme matches logo (navy #1a1b5c, orange #f57c00, magenta #e91e63)
